title: Kerala SSLC Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Kerala SSLC Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Kerala SSLC Result 2026 for Class 10 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website - sslcexam.kerala.gov.in. Students can check the direct link provided here and follow the steps to download their Kerala SSLC result.

content.text: Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan has released the SSLC Result 2026 for Class 10 students. The results for the academic session 2025–26 are now available online for students who appeared in the Secondary School Leaving Certificate (SSLC) examination. Students can access their marks online without having to visit their schools.

Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan announced the SSLC Result 2026 for Class 10 students on 15 May 2026. The results have been made available online, allowing students to easily access their marks through the official website using their login credentials.

rows: Registration Number and Date of Birth

content.text: Kerala Pareeksha Bhavan will activate the direct link to check SSLC Result 2026 online. Students will be able to use the official link below to view and download their Class 10 marksheet instantly from the portal.

sections.heading: How to Download Kerala SSLC Result 2026

items: Click on the link for "SSLC Result 2026".
Enter your registration number and date of birth.
Your SSLC Result 2026 will be displayed on the screen.
Download and take a printout for future reference.
